case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. KHUN UNG ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OCT-29-2019 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS THAT A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE IN LIGHT OF THE HISTORY OF FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDERS AND RULES. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST RYAN E. VOS, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: SEP-10-2019, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-01-2019. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-10-2019 CONTINUED TO OCT-29-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. ***NOTICE: IMPENDING DISCRETIONARY DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE 68608(B).*** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100033477), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED APR-23-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT UNG, KHUN
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-04-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS (TRANSACTION ID # 100071873) FILED BY ATTORNEY VOS, RYAN E.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-04-2019 CONTINUED TO SEP-10-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-29-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-29-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective in light of the history of failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-11-2019 Continued To Oct-29-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Oct-29-2019 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. ***NOTICE: Impending Discretionary Dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b).*** Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-30-2019 Continued To Sep-10-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
